mapper.insert: insert into kb_embedding(qa_id, content_type, content, embedding, model) values(#{qaId}, #{contentType}, #{content}, #{vector}::vector, #{model})
mapper.select: select q.id as "qaId", q.question, q.answer, greatest(0, 1 - (e.embedding <=> #{vector}::vector)) as score, 'vector' as source from kb_embedding e join kb_qa q on q.id = e.qa_id where q.status = 'published' order by e.embedding <=> #{vector}::vector limit #{topK}
